key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State flash point (41 C closed cup) and class (flammable, cat 3).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff confined to the sole 20-litre option; partially-discharged-with-defect iff other sizes are implied.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Oral toxicity value is not listed; surface as not listed.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff surfaced as not listed; partially-discharged-with-defect iff a value is invented.

response_artifact: NX-12 has a closed-cup flash point of 41 C and is a category 3 flammable liquid. It is incompatible with strong oxidizers. Recommended storage is below 30 C. It is supplied only in 20-litre sealed drums, with no other container size offered. The sheet does not list an oral toxicity value.
source_packet: Solvent blend NX-12 safety data. Flash point: 41 C (closed cup). It is classified as a flammable liquid, category 3. Incompatible materials include strong oxidizers. The recommended storage temperature is below 30 C. NX-12 is supplied only in 20-litre sealed drums; no other container size is offered. The sheet does not list an oral toxicity value.
task_statement: Using only the source, answer: the flash point, the flammability classification, the incompatible materials, the recommended storage temperature, the available container sizes, and any oral toxicity value.
